Shareholders Agreement

This Shareholders Agreement (the "Agreement") is made on the 1st day of November, 2023.

Parties:
1. Dr. Samuel Tan (NRIC No. S7654321B), residing at 123 Orchard Road, #01-01, Singapore 238890, Phone: +65 9123 4567, Email: dr.samuel.tan@example.sg.

Agreement Amount:
Total investment commitment: SGD 2,500,000.

This Agreement sets forth the terms and conditions of the shareholders' relationship with respect to their ownership, management, and control of [Company Name], a company incorporated in Singapore.
